host.label: Host
host.help: IP address or host name of the TCP RS485 bridge.

tcpPort.label: TCP port
tcpPort.help: TCP port of the Waveshare ETH-to-RS485 bridge.

pollMs.label: Polling interval
pollMs.help: Time between polling cycles in milliseconds.

requestTimeoutMs.label: Request timeout
requestTimeoutMs.help: Maximum wait time for a device response in milliseconds.

switchRetryDelayMs.label: Switch retry delay
switchRetryDelayMs.help: Delay between switch retries in milliseconds.

nightStart.label: Night mode starts
nightStart.help: Hour when polling is skipped, from 0 to 23.

nightEnd.label: Night mode ends
nightEnd.help: Hour when polling resumes, from 0 to 23.
